cars.description: The E46 M3 remains the gold standard for naturally aspirated BMW motorsport heritage. Its S54 engine revs to 8000 RPM and produces 360 HP in stock form. Final M3 with a manual as factory option.

The legendary A80 Supra with its 2JZ-GTE engine - arguably the most robust production engine ever made. 326 HP from the factory (JDM) but famously capable of handling 1000+ HP on stock bottom end. The ultimate JDM cruiser.
The F355 represents the end of the analog Ferrari era before electronics took over. Its 3.5L V8 built 380 HP and screamed to 8250 RPM. Fabulous gated shifter and pininfarina perfection.
Honda engineering at its finest - the AP1 S2000 revs to 9000 RPM with the F20C producing 240 HP from 2.0 liters. The ultimate front-midship roadster with razor-sharp handling and zero assistance.

The W140 S-Class was Mercedes maximum expression of excess - wider longer and heavier than necessary. The 500E variant packed a 5.0L V8 producing 322 HP with a surprising 0-60 of 5.0 seconds. Famously overbuilt.

Fiche technique et performances de la Genesis G90 3.3 T-GDi AWD 370 ch (2016-2022)

Caracteristiques Genesis G90 3.3 T-GDi AWD 370 ch
Puissance: 272kW
Couple: 510Nm

Moteur longitudinal avant 6 cylindres en V 3342 cm3 24 soupapes injection directe 2 Turbos
Puissance Maxi: 370 ch (272 kW) a 6000 tr/min (Regime Maxi 7000 tr/min)
Couple Maxi: 510 Nm (52 mkg) de 1300 a 4500 tr/min
Ratios: 111 ch/L (81 kW/L) - 153 Nm/L

Transmission: Integrale
Boite de vitesse automatique a 8 rapports avec mode sequentiel
Pneus: 245/45/19 AV - 275/40/19 AR
Freins AV: Disques ventiles (360mm)
Freins AR: Disques ventiles (340mm)

Dimensions: 5205 x 1915 x 1495 mm - Garde au sol: 130mm
Empattement: 3160 mm - Voies: AV 1640 mm / AR 1639 mm
Porte-a-faux: AV 860 mm / AR 1185 mm

Poids annonce: 2170 kg (DIN) 2245 kg (UE)
Repartition du poids Av/Ar: 53/47 %
Rapport Poids/Puissance: 6.1 kg/ch = 120 kW/T = 163 ch/T
Rapport Couple/Poids: 225 Nm/T

Consommation mixte normalisee: 9.8 L/100 - sportive: 13.9 L/100
Capacite du reservoir: 83 L
Autonomie ~760 km

Prix de base neuf indicatif: ~94 400 EUR

Indice ZePerfs 154
